ksa_text: Conduct privacy impact assessments for new or materially changed data processing activities, documenting findings and mitigation recommendations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to HIPAA Privacy and Security Officer scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("impact assess", "privacy.{0,15} ?:risk|assess|impact"). STRM composite is moderate (0.4300); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working HIPAA Privacy and Security Officer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in HIPAA Privacy and Security Officer work (domain affinity 0.80, 2 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
